calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Entered On March 18, 2003 And November 18, 2003 Due To Fraud Upon Court Ccp 473(D)
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - TAMIKO POWELL, TEL. NO. 1-707-539-6175, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. REBECCA A. BERS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-554-4224 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT AND THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TAMIKO POWELL'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment Entered On March 18, 2003 And November 18, 2003 Due To Fraud Upon Court CCP 473(D) is DENIED. The November 18, 2003 judgment in CCSF's favor is based on the Court's granting of Defendant's motion for judgment on the pleadings on August 18, 2003, on the basis that Plaintiff's claims were barred by the Statute of Limitations. Plaintiff does not now provide any explanation for how the claim is not barred by the statute of limitations. Nor does Plaintiff explain why the Court should entertain this motion now, 12 years after the entry of judgment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
